title: Fermented Portuguese Casserole with Silky Sauce and Dates
description: A rich and savory Portuguese-inspired casserole with a silky sauce, featuring fermented ingredients and sweet dates.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and onion; cook until softened, 3-4 minutes.
Add crumbled fermented cheese and cook until melted and fragrant, 2-3 minutes.
Stir in silky sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together cubed Portuguese bread and chopped dates.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of bread mixture.
Pour cheese sauce over bread mixture and repeat until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of cheese sauce on top.
Season with salt to taste and garnish with chopped parsley.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and heated through.
